changes.value:
views/src/changelog.rs:117

Undo-of-Create compensating Delete entry sets previous and current to None. Redoing (undo of that Delete) fails because previous is None.

Fix: capture view snapshot as previous before deleting.
BLOCKER: Undo-of-Create logs previous:None -- redo path broken
